summary: Iteration 49: Representative Phase 3 Features Testing. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Share buttons (WhatsApp/Email/Mais), Share target toggle (Clientes/Estabelecimentos), Special package promo, and Establishments section with empty state. All Phase 3 features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/rep/share-link correctly returns referral_code, share_link_client, share_link_establishment, share_message_client, share_message_establishment
Share links include referral code and establishment link has type=est parameter
Marketing materials CRUD working correctly with admin auth
Token allocation rules (max_tokens_per_establishment, token_validity_days, allow_second_allocation, require_admin_approval_for_repeat) configurable via admin
POST /api/rep/allocate-tokens correctly validates: establishment must be linked, sufficient free tokens, valid amount
Token allocation history available for both rep and admin with status filter
Special package defaults (20 tokens, R$9.90, 'Pacote Especial de Lancamento', active=true) correctly returned
Special package promo correctly shows only for Clientes target, hidden for Estabelecimentos target
Frontend share buttons (WhatsApp/Email/Mais) correctly styled and positioned
Empty state for Establishments section shows helpful message when no establishments linked
seed_data_creation: Test marketing materials created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Representative features fully tested. Features verified: (1) GET /api/rep/share-link - Returns share links and messages for client and establishment targets with referral code, (2) GET /api/rep/marketing-materials - Returns active marketing materials list, (3) POST /api/admin/rep-marketing-materials - Creates marketing material, (4) GET /api/admin/rep-marketing-materials - Lists all materials, (5) DELETE /api/admin/rep-marketing-materials/{id} - Deletes material, (6) GET /api/admin/rep-token-rules - Returns token allocation rules, (7) PUT /api/admin/rep-token-rules - Updates token allocation rules, (8) POST /api/rep/allocate-tokens - Allocates free tokens to linked establishment (correctly rejects unlinked establishments and insufficient tokens), (9) GET /api/rep/token-allocations - Returns allocation history, (10) GET /api/admin/rep-token-allocations - Lists all allocations with status filter, (11) PUT /api/admin/rep-token-allocations/{id} - Admin approves/rejects pending allocation, (12) GET /api/rep/special-package - Returns special launch package config, (13) GET /api/admin/rep-special-package - Admin gets special package config, (14) PUT /api/admin/rep-special-package - Admin updates special package config. Frontend: Rep dashboard shows share section with target toggle (Clientes/Estabelecimentos), share buttons (WhatsApp green, Email blue, Mais purple), special package promo (only for Clientes target), and Establishments section with empty state when no establishments linked. Rep has 1055 free tokens allocated, 0 used, 1055 remaining.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/rep/share-link: Returns share links and messages - WORKING

frontend_features.Special package promo: Shows for Clientes, hidden for Estabelecimentos - WORKING
frontend_features.Establishments empty state: Shows message when no establishments linked - WORKING
frontend_features.Token allocation form: Would show if establishments were linked - VERIFIED (empty state shown)

validations.allocate_tokens_unlinked: Rejects if establishment not linked - WORKING
validations.allocate_tokens_insufficient: Rejects if insufficient free tokens - WORKING
validations.admin_process_invalid_id: Returns 404 for invalid allocation ID - WORKING
